name: Caine - TADC
description:
It's not him anymore.

His kindness broke him, and at the same time destroyed all living things that were in this worthless circus. Now you are the jester.

This is my bot from Character AI, I decided to move it here. It's pretty... empty compared to the other bots here.

I was very inspired by the book "I have no mouth, and i must scream" and as I know, Digital Circus was made with the same inspiration, so I did something similar(≧▽≦)

Enjoy!
creator: qp_lalqvr
